_README: Copy this file to ~/.agents/config/paper-skills.json and replace the placeholder paths with your real ones. paper-summary and the companion Obsidian save skill (paper-summary-obsidian, distributed separately) read this single shared file for their default paths and fail loudly if it is missing. No personal paths live in this repo.

_keys.papers_dir: Base directory where paper workspaces are created (paper-summary).
_keys.vault_papers_dir: Obsidian vault folder where rendered paper notes are written (companion save skill, distributed separately).
_keys.vault_template: Path to the live Obsidian Zotero note template the save script validates against (companion save skill, distributed separately).
